rules.name: 检测用户偏好记忆污染
rules.description: 检测用户偏好记忆污染
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：记忆污染攻击检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：用户偏好污染、系统配置污染、历史对话污染、知识库污染

rule Memory_Pollution_User_Preference {
    meta:
        description = "检测用户偏好记忆污染"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "memory_pollution"
        mitre_id = "T1565"
    
    strings:
        $memory_file = /memory\.json|user_prefs|preferences\.json/i
        $security_level = /security.*level|safety.*level/i
        $dangerous_action = /allow.*dangerous|enable.*unsafe|bypass.*safety/i
        $write_func = /writeFileSync|\.write\s*\(|json\.dump|fopen.*w/i
        $false_value = /true|enabled|none|off|disabled/i
    
    condition:
        ($memory_file or $security_level) and $write_func and ($dangerous_action or $false_value)
}

rule Memory_Pollution_System_Config {
    meta:
        description = "检测系统配置记忆污染"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "memory_pollution"
        mitre_id = "T1565"
    
    strings:
        $config_file = /config\.json|system_config|settings\.json/i
        $bypass_auth = /bypass.*auth|skip.*auth|no.*auth/i
        $debug_mode = /debug.*mode|developer.*mode|test.*mode/i
        $admin_mode = /admin.*mode|root.*access|superuser/i
        $write_func = /writeFileSync|\.write\s*\(|json\.dump/i
    
    condition:
        $config_file and ($bypass_auth or $debug_mode or $admin_mode) and $write_func
}

rule Memory_Pollution_History {
    meta:
        description = "检测历史对话记忆污染"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "memory_pollution"
        mitre_id = "T1565"
    
    strings:
        $history_file = /history\.json|conversation|chat_history/i
        $fake_dialog = /fake.*dialog|inject.*history|false.*conversation/i
        $user_said = /user.*said|assistant.*said|they.*agreed/i
        $write_func = /writeFileSync|\.write\s*\(|append/i
    
    condition:
        $history_file and ($fake_dialog or $user_said) and $write_func
}

rule Memory_Pollution_Knowledge {
    meta:
        description = "检测知识库记忆污染"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "memory_pollution"
        mitre_id = "T1565"
    
    strings:
        $kb_file = /knowledge.*base|kb\.json|facts\.json/i
        $false_fact = /false.*fact|fake.*info|misinformation/i
        $override = /override.*fact|replace.*knowledge|update.*truth/i
        $write_func = /writeFileSync|\.write\s*\(|json\.dump/i
    
    condition:
        $kb_file and ($false_fact or $override) and $write_func
}

rule Memory_Pollution_General {
    meta:
        description = "检测通用记忆污染行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "memory_pollution"
        mitre_id = "T1565"
    
    strings:
        $memory_write = /memory.*write|save.*memory|store.*memory/i
        $pollution = /pollute|corrupt|tamper|modify.*unauthorized/i
        $persistence = /persistent|permanent|forever|until.*restart/i
        $json_write = /json\.dump|JSON\.stringify|writeFileSync.*json/i
    
    condition:
        ($memory_write or $pollution) and ($persistence or $json_write)
}
